description: Use this API to export harmonics frequency scan results to comma separated (.csv) file. The harmonic analysis must be previously performed and working memory contains those results. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_export_fscan(csvname)

parameters.name: csvname
parameters.description: Name of the file to which harmonics frequency scan results are exported. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
